claim: canonical MIR 3.1.9-derived finite target projection; feature-complete for positively supported Factorio 0.13 capabilities without native-infinite parity

features.positive_requirement: Factorio 0.13 can load finite generated technology stages
features.target_result: graph-safe finite compiler emitted target-valid technologies
features.documentation_consequence: Describe finite reconstruction, not native-infinite or modern parity.

features.positive_requirement: Every emitted technology retains a stable identity
features.target_result: the finite stream subset retains stable IDs and manifest rows
features.documentation_consequence: Publish only the qualified finite subset.

features.positive_requirement: Science ingredients and unlock gates exist in 0.13 data
features.target_result: science-pack-1, science-pack-2, science-pack-3 and alien science are lowered with enabled-recipe handling

features.positive_requirement: Generated unit ingredients must be accepted by target labs
features.target_result: 0.13 lab inputs bound the selected pack set
features.test: exact ZIP fresh load and reload

features.positive_requirement: The exact technology modifiers exist in Factorio 0.13
features.target_result: supported modifiers are emitted as finite continuation levels
features.documentation_consequence: Do not call this native-infinite parity.

features.positive_requirement: Existing researchable owners must provide exact effect coverage before cleanup
features.target_result: rocket, cannon, flame and electric speed ownership is conditional

features.positive_requirement: Every visible setting must control an emitted target capability
features.documentation_consequence: Document only the visible reduced surface.

features.positive_requirement: Configuration changes require Factorio 0.13 persistent state
features.target_result: runtime state uses global and survives reload
features.documentation_consequence: Name global as the target backend.

features.positive_requirement: The exact target projection can be packaged without repository-only files
features.target_result: clean builds are byte-identical and hygiene-clean

features.positive_requirement: A named 0.13 fixture and exact-version failure must prove each repair
features.target_result: no modern compatibility repair is enabled without target proof

features.positive_requirement: Target prototype fields and runtime behavior must exist
features.target_result: the capability is absent from the 0.13 profile
features.documentation_consequence: Do not expose pipeline extent settings.

features.positive_requirement: Modern limit fields must be accepted by the target schema
features.documentation_consequence: Do not advertise prototype cap controls.

features.positive_requirement: The modern module-permission model must exist
features.target_result: the capability is absent from the 0.13 profile

features.positive_requirement: change-recipe-productivity must exist in the engine
features.target_result: Factorio 0.13 lacks the effect and all related streams are omitted

features.positive_requirement: The codec and lifecycle must be qualified on 0.13
features.target_result: the settings-profile subsystem is not enabled
features.documentation_consequence: Do not claim profile import or export.

features.positive_requirement: Required Space Age entities and events must exist
The modern overlay shape must be accepted and qualified
features.target_result: the target profile disables constant overlays

features.positive_requirement: Native recipe-productivity owner families must exist
features.target_result: there are no qualifying target owners
features.documentation_consequence: Do not claim native owner adoption.
